notes.anchor: what Antony has done about the law
notes.note: Mark Antony's legislative program of 44 BC, much of it pushed through after Caesar's death; Cicero watches it warily from his country retreat.

notes.anchor: the knee is closer than the shin
notes.note: A Greek proverb (gony knemes engion, 'the knee is nearer than the shin'): one's own interests come first. Cicero quotes it to reassure Tiro he is not pulling him off the contract.
